title: Donate
intro: Every rupee helps us move surplus food to people who need it — fuel for a volunteer's scooter, a crate for a pickup, a warm meal that would otherwise have been wasted. Give what you can; it goes straight into the rescue loop.
secured: Payments are securely processed by Razorpay. We never see or store your card details.
errorGeneric: Something went wrong starting your donation. Please try again.
errorAmount: Please enter an amount of at least ₹10.
thanksBody: We've received your payment request. If it went through, your receipt is on its way to your email — no need to do anything else.
